column4:
Letter sounds ->  introduce pictures and names of objects starting with the same letter -> identify the common starting letter sound -> introduce the letter - both capital and small letter.
Example: king, kite, kid -> /k/ -> Kk.

column4: Game 1:  The Jumble. 7–10 letters (Target letters + 2 "Decoy" letters). A riddle or a "context sentence" for the clue.  A "Did you know?" or "Factoid" using that word.

column3: Understand the rules for each of these letter groups
column4:
1) Vowel Teams - ai, ay, ee, ea, oa, ou, ow, oi, oy.
2) R-Controlled Vowels - ar, er, ir, or, ur. (e.g., Car vs. Cat).
3) Diphthongs & Variants - au, aw, oo, ew.

We will need to add syllabification and prefix-suffix in this level.
